fields._canvas: The canvas being used to show settings.
fields._panel: The legacy panel being used as a base to interact with the settings.
fields._currentPanel: the rectangle transform of the currently viewed panel.
fields._container: The slot to store UI elements.
fields._connectAddress: The field to read an OBS websocket connect address from.
fields._connectPassword: The field to read an OBS websocket connect password from.
fields._status: The current status of the OBS connection.
fields._streamTime: The text to fill with how long the user has been streaming.
fields._bytesPerSec: The text to fill with how many bytes per second the user is streaming.
fields._fps: The text to fill with how many frames per second the user is streaming.
fields._droppedFrames: The text to fill with how many dropped frames the user has had streaming.
fields._streamButton: the button that will start the streaming process to OBS.
fields._recordButton: the button to start recording using OBS.
fields._recordingStarted: The field to fill with when the user started recording.
fields._launchOBSbutton: the button to boot OBS for the user when pressed.
fields._autoMirror: The button to enable the auto mirror option.

methods.OnReturnToConnect: A setting changing handler for the panel.
methods.OnLaunchOBS: A setting changing handler for the panel.
methods.OnConnect: A setting changing handler for the panel.
methods.OnStream: A setting changing handler for the panel.
methods.OnRecord: A setting changing handler for the panel.
